tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Artist: Eminem
Song: Not Afraid
Album: Recovery

Capo 3

F/A: x03210


[Chorus]

[tab]          [ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]F/A[/ch]
I'm not afraid to take a stand[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]
Everybody come take my hand[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]Am[/ch]
We'll walk this road together, through the storm[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]F/A[/ch]
Whatever weather, cold or warm[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]C[/ch]
Just let you know that, you're not alone[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]G[/ch]
Holla if you feel that you've been down the same road[/tab]


[Verse]

[tab]                [ch]Am[/ch]
You can try and read my lyrics off of this paper before I lay 'em[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]F/A[/ch]
But you won't take the sting out these words before I say 'em[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C[/ch]
Cause ain't no way Imma let you stop me from causing mayhem[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]
When I say Imma do something I do it, I don't give a damn[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Am[/ch]
What you think, I'm doing this for me, so fuck the world[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]F/A[/ch]
Feed it beans, it's gassed up, if it thinks it's stopping me[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]
Imma be what I set out to be, without a doubt undoubtedly[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]
And all those who look down on me I'm tearing down your balcony[/tab]

[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
No if ands or buts don't try to ask him why or how can he[/tab]
[tab][ch]F/A[/ch]
From Infinite down to the last Relapse album he's still[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
Shit, and whether he's on salary, paid hourly[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]G[/ch]
Until he bows out or he shits his bowels out of him[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Am[/ch]
Whichever comes first, for better or worse[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]F/A[/ch]
He's married to the game, like a fuck you for Christmas[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]C[/ch]
His gift is a curse, forget the earth he's got the urge[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]G[/ch]
To pull his dick from the dirt and fuck the whole universe[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]          [ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]F/A[/ch]
I'm not afraid to take a stand[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]
Everybody come take my hand[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]Am[/ch]
We'll walk this road together, through the storm[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]F/A[/ch]
Whatever weather, cold or warm[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]C[/ch]
Just let you know that, you're not alone[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]G[/ch]
Holla if you feel that you've been down the same road[/tab]


[Verse]

[tab]                         [ch]Am[/ch]
Ok quit playin' with the scissors and shit, and cut the crap[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]F/A[/ch]
I shouldn't have to rhyme these words in the rhythm for you to know it's a rap[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]C[/ch]
You said you was king, you lied through your teeth[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]G[/ch]
For that fuck your feelings, instead of getting crowned you're getting capped[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Am[/ch]
And to the fans, I'll never let you down again, I'm back[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]F/A[/ch]
I promise to never go back on that promise, in fact[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]
Let's be honest, that last Relapse CD was "ehhhh"[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]
Perhaps I ran them accents into the ground[/tab]

[tab]       [ch]Am[/ch]
Relax, I ain't going back to that now[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]F/A[/ch]
All I'm tryna say is get back, click-clack BLAOW[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]C[/ch]
Cause I ain't playin' around, it's a game called circle and I don't know how[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
I'm way too up to back down[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Am[/ch]
But I think I'm still tryna figure this crap out[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]F/A[/ch]
Thought I had it mapped out but I guess I didn't[/tab]
[tab]                               [ch]C[/ch]
This fucking black cloud still follows me around, but it's time to exorcise these demons[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]
These motherfuckers are doing jumping jacks now![/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]          [ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]F/A[/ch]
I'm not afraid to take a stand[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]
Everybody come take my hand[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]Am[/ch]
We'll walk this road together, through the storm[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]F/A[/ch]
Whatever weather, cold or warm[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]C[/ch]
Just let you know that, you're not alone[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]G[/ch]
Holla if you feel that you've been down the same road[/tab]


[Bridge]

[tab]                      [ch]F[/ch]
And I just can't keep living this way[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]C[/ch]                            [ch]G[/ch]
So starting today, I'm breaking out of this cage[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Am[/ch]
I'm standing up, Imma face my demons[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]F[/ch]
I'm manning up, Imma hold my ground[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]
I've had enough, now I'm so fed up[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]G[/ch]
Time to put my life back together right now[/tab]


[Verse]

[tab]            [ch]Am[/ch]
It was my decision to get clean, I did it for me[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]F/A[/ch]
Admittedly I probably did it subliminally for you[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]C[/ch]
So I could come back a brand new me, you helped see me through[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]
And don't even realise what you did, believe me you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
I been through the ringer, but they can do little to the middle[/tab]
[tab][ch]F/A[/ch]
Finger, I think I got a tear in my eye, I feel like[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]
The king of, my world, haters can make like bees with no[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Stingers, and drop dead, no more bee flingers[/tab]

[tab]        [ch]Am[/ch]
No more drama from now on, I promise to focus soley[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]F/A[/ch]
On handling my responsibilities as a father[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]
So I solemnly swear to always treat this roof like my daughters[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]
And raise it, you couldn't lift a single shingle on it[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Am[/ch]
Cause the way I feel, I'm strong enough to go to the club[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]F/A[/ch]
Or a corner pub and lift the whole liquor counter up[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]
Cause I'm raising the bar, I'd shoot for the moon[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]G[/ch]
But I'm too busy gazing at stars, I feel amazing and[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]          [ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]F/A[/ch]
I'm not afraid to take a stand[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]
Everybody come take my hand[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]Am[/ch]
We'll walk this road together, through the storm[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]F/A[/ch]
Whatever weather, cold or warm[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]C[/ch]
Just let you know that, you're not alone[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]G[/ch]
Holla if you feel that you've been down the same road[/tab]
